description_long: This is a rustic, two-handled ceramic vase with a rounded body and a slightly flared rim. The surface displays a blend of off-white and earthy beige tones, with visible gradients and some irregularities in coloration, suggesting handcrafting or age. The handles are thick, rounded, and symmetrically placed on opposite sides, providing both functional grip and visual balance. The body of the vase is bulbous, tapering gently towards a small, stable base. There are no visible decorative motifs or embellishments, giving it a utilitarian yet charmingly weathered appearance. The finish is matte with subtle textural variations, and the overall form is slightly asymmetrical, enhancing its artisanal character.
description: A rustic, two-handled ceramic vase with a rounded body, off-white and beige tones, and a matte, weathered finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing both rounded handles and the full, bulbous body with visible color gradients.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting one handle and the vase's gentle taper towards the base, with more shadowed surface.
description_view_2: Opposite front view with both handles visible, showing a slightly different angle of the color transitions.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the other handle, with the rim and body curvature clearly visible.
